admission_profile.name: learning_first_unified
admission_profile.description: One training recipe for both checks: the agent must show a real learning signal against the do-nothing opponent, and training must stay fast enough on the same model, opponents, shield, and rollout geometry. Speed is measured from the same 200-update learning run (updates 3–20 of the gate JSONL) — no separate 20-update GPU job.
admission_profile.locked_recipe_summary: Operator locked admission from picker preset beat_noop_core with deltas: mixed 2-player and 4-player rollouts (50/50), 32 parallel envs, 256 rollout steps, 3 planet candidates per turn, Weights & Biases logging (group preflight), replay artifacts off. Uses small factorized transformer, cheap shield, noop-only opponents, curriculum off.
admission_profile.user_direction: Proof of learning beats raw throughput. Reject the prior split where speed used self-play + full model while learning used noop + small model. Capture a new speed baseline from this unified recipe (replacing the old primary-preset framing).

prior_recommendation_superseded.name: tier2_admission
prior_recommendation_superseded.what_it_meant: Two different training setups sharing only a thin common spine: speed check used self-play with the full transformer; learning proof used the noop opponent with a smaller model and fewer envs. A commit could pass one check while training on an incomparable path.
prior_recommendation_superseded.why_rejected: User requires one comparable training config for both gates; learning requirements are the source of truth.

picker_workflow.purpose: Browser form over the default Hydra composition. Adjust leaves, fix cross-field warnings, copy Hydra overrides or YAML diff for conf/ updates. Regenerate after conf/ or schema.py changes.
picker_workflow.operator_note: Start from beat_noop defaults below; only change model/opponents/training geometry with explicit recalibration intent. Default beat_noop model (transformer_factorized_small) is calibrated — upgrading model size requires new threshold calibration.

operator_locked_overrides.picker_note: YAML diff is deltas vs beat_noop_core only. Picker showed rollout_microbatch_envs=32; with 50/50 mixed format and 32 envs each format group gets 16 envs, so microbatch resolves to 16 (32 is invalid). Canonical runnable form uses training=2p4p_32_split instead of training=2p_16 plus leaf format/env overrides.
changes_vs_beat_noop_default: 16 envs × 128 steps → 32 envs × 256 steps (~4× env-steps per update)
replay artifacts explicitly disabled (artifact pipeline still off)

threshold_recalibration.reason: beat_noop thresholds in preflight-calibration.json were measured on 2-player-only, 16 envs, 128 steps, candidate_count=6. Mixed format and longer rollouts change win-rate dynamics and PPO batch geometry; recalibrate with ow benchmark calibrate before treating failures as regressions.
threshold_recalibration.throughput_reason: Env-steps per update and per-format compile cost differ from the prior 2p_16×128 proposal; capture a new launch-hygiene-e2e-baseline-learning-first.json on this locked recipe before ±10% gating.

proposed_core_overrides.description: Superseded by operator_locked_overrides (2026-06-05). Kept for diff reference.
proposed_core_overrides.ppo_profile_note: beat_noop gate applies transformer_factorized_small PPO overrides automatically (lr, clip_coef, ent_coef, vf_coef, max_grad_norm, epochs, update_chunk_rows, reseed_every_updates=0). Throughput capture must include the same PPO bundle — use gate dry-run output or append profile overrides from docs/benchmarks/preflight-profiles.json.

throughput_extract.description: After beat_noop (200 updates), extract env_steps_per_sec and seconds_per_update_mean from the gate JSONL using updates 3–20 (skip JIT warmup updates 1–2). Matches launch-hygiene measurement window without a second training job.
throughput_extract.gate_compose: uv run ow benchmark gate run beat_noop --also-throughput --throughput-baseline <baseline.json>

throughput_baseline_capture.purpose: One-time baseline JSON only (ow benchmark training or 3× gate+log extract after picker locks recipe). Not required for every cherry-pick once baseline exists.

learn_proof.thresholds: win_rate_delta >= 0.05 over last 10 updates, approx_kl <= 0.15, entropy >= 0.0001

admission_profile.verify_resolved_config: uv run ow train print_resolved_config=true model=transformer_factorized_small task=shield_cheap training=2p4p_32_split training.rollout_steps=256 task.candidate_count=3 opponents=noop_only curriculum=off telemetry.wandb.enabled=true telemetry.wandb.group=preflight artifacts.artifact_pipeline.enabled=false artifacts.replay.enabled=false telemetry.metric_groups.action_decision=true seed=42 training.log_every=1 training.lr=0.0003 training.clip_coef=0.2 training.ent_coef=0.005 training.vf_coef=0.5 training.max_grad_norm=0.5 training.epochs=2 training.update_chunk_rows=1024 training.reseed_every_updates=0

capture_throughput_baseline.description: Capture a reference baseline JSON from the unified recipe (3×20-update runs OR 3 gate runs with admission-throughput extract). Cherry-pick admission then compares each candidate's gate JSONL extract against this file.
capture_throughput_baseline.command_template_training: env -u JAX_COMPILATION_CACHE_DIR ORBIT_WARS_PYTEST_JAX_CACHE=0 uv run ow benchmark training --overrides <core+PPO overrides from picker/gate dry-run> --label learning_first_capture --updates 20 --warmup 2 --repeats 3 --detailed-timing --out docs/benchmarks/launch-hygiene-e2e-baseline-learning-first.json
capture_throughput_baseline.command_template_hybrid: uv run ow benchmark gate run beat_noop --out /tmp/gate.json && uv run ow benchmark admission-throughput /tmp/gate.json
capture_throughput_baseline.follow_up: Point Makefile test-launch-hygiene-e2e-throughput and manifest baseline_gates at the new JSON once capture is approved.

learn_proof_on_anchor.dry_run: uv run ow benchmark gate run beat_noop --dry-run --verbose
learn_proof_on_anchor.capture: uv run ow benchmark gate run beat_noop --out outputs/benchmarks/cherry-pick/anchor_learn_proof.json

rejected_alternatives.label: tier2_admission (split heads)
rejected_alternatives.reason: User rejected different configs for speed vs learning; dual gate was meaningless under incomparable paths.

rejected_alternatives.label: primary preset (self_play + transformer_factorized)
rejected_alternatives.reason: Superseded as admission framing; old baseline captured pre-hygiene speed without learning signal on same recipe.

rejected_alternatives.label: self_play_only for learning proof
rejected_alternatives.reason: ~50% win rate is not a learning signal; beat_noop requires noop_only.

rejected_alternatives.label: transformer_factorized without recalibration
rejected_alternatives.reason: beat_noop thresholds calibrated on transformer_factorized_small; full model needs new calibration campaign.

throughput_e2e.baseline_superseded_note: Old baseline used primary preset (self-play, full transformer, 32 envs × 500 steps). Locked admission recipe is noop, small model, mixed 2p/4p, 32 envs × 256 steps. Numbers are not comparable — do not gate new captures against the old JSON or the earlier 2p_16×128 proposal.

prior_capture.note: Captured under tier2_admission / primary preset; invalid under learning-first unified direction.

criterion: Learning candidates require Kaggle mechanics parity (make test-kaggle-parity), training throughput within ±10% of the learning-first unified baseline (once captured), and learn-proof beat_noop VERIFIED at calibrated thresholds — all on the same core training recipe.

supplementary_format_coverage.label: 4p_only
supplementary_format_coverage.notes: Advisory until a 4p baseline exists on the unified recipe.

supplementary_format_coverage.label: 2p4p_split
supplementary_format_coverage.notes: Operator locked 50/50 mixed format as the admission recipe (2026-06-05). Learning thresholds still calibrated on 2p-only — treat gate results as provisional until recalibration.

decision: Learning-first unified admission locked 2026-06-05 via config picker (beat_noop_core + operator deltas). Recipe: mixed 2p/4p, 32×256 rollouts, candidate_count=3, wandb preflight. Next: capture launch-hygiene-e2e-baseline-learning-first.json on this recipe, run beat_noop with gate --train-overrides, admission-throughput ±10%, then env-parity cherry-picks. Recalibrate beat_noop learning-signal thresholds if mixed-format gate results are ambiguous.
